name: 32" Scandi Small Bookcase with Storage Drawers Natural - Room Essentials™
description:
Put together a perfectly polished work or study area with this Scandi Small Bookcase from Room Essentials™. Standing at about 32 inches high, this small bookcase features mix of open shelving and closed compartments to offer room to display books or small accent items while concealing stationery and other essentials. Designed in a natural hue, this small bookcase will blend seamlessly with any existing decor style.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 38 inches
Overall Height: 32-1/4 inches
Overall Depth: 15-1/2 inches
Distance from floor to bottom of apron: 2-1/4 inches
Distance from bottom frame to shelf panel: 8-7/8 inches
Distance from shelf panel to top panel: 8-7/8 inches
Depth of top panel: 14 inches
Thickness of top panel: 5/8 inches
Width of drawer front panel: 16-5/8 inches
Height of drawer front panel: 8-1/4 inches
Width of drawer box: 15-3/4 inches
Height of drawer box: 5-1/8 inches
Depth of drawer box: 11-3/4 inches
